name: LAF Productization Lessons — Source Registry
policy: original summaries; no third-party source vendored

sources.title: Repository cleanup and production-readiness gating across sprints (stacked gates, hygiene, fresh-clone proof)
Honest classification ladder and external-gate discipline (internal vs GA, named blockers, no faked parity)
Release restraint and advisory disclosure (no unrequested tag/merge, honest dev/test-only advisory disclosure)
